# Quran Foundation API

> API documentation for Quran.com content, search, user, and authentication APIs.

## OpenAPI Specifications

- [Content APIs v4](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/openAPI/content/v4.json): Verses, chapters, translations, tafsirs, audio
- [User APIs v1 (Production)](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/openAPI/user-related-apis/v1.json): Stable production documentation for bookmarks, collections, notes, profiles, rooms, posts
- [User APIs v1 (Pre-live)](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/openAPI/user-related-apis/pre-live/v1.json): Upcoming pre-live documentation for unreleased user API changes
- [OAuth2 APIs v1](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/openAPI/oauth2-apis/v1.json): Authentication and authorization
- [Search APIs v1](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/openAPI/search/v1.json): Quran text search

## Agent Prompts and Starters

- [QF_NPX_STARTER_PROMPT_V1](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/agent-prompts/qf-next-starter.md): Copyable prompt for the official Next.js starter app
- [Agent prompt registry](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/.well-known/agent-prompts/index.json): Machine-readable prompt catalog
- [Developer Journey](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/developer-journey/): Choose the right starting point by app shape
- [API Reference](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/api-reference/): Choose between Content, Search, User APIs, OAuth2, and pre-live endpoint references
- [Starter With NPX](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/oidc/starter-with-npx/): One-command Next.js app scaffold
- [JavaScript SDK](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/): Runtime-split SDK guidance for public and server code

## Getting Started

- [📢 API Updates](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/updates/)
- [AI Agents](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/ai-agents/)
- [Field Reference](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/api/field-reference/)
- [First Content API Call](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/quickstart/first-api-call/)
- [Manual Authentication for Content APIs](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/quickstart/manual-authentication/)
- [Migrate from api.quran.com to Quran Foundation Content APIs](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/quickstart/migration/)
- [Quran Foundation Content APIs OAuth2 Quickstart](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/quickstart/)
- [Token Management for Content APIs](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/quickstart/token-management/)

## JavaScript SDK

- [App Shapes](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/app-shapes/)
- [Runtime Matrix](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/runtime-matrix/)
- [Auth Matrix](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/auth-matrix/)
- [SDK Entrypoint Matrix](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/entrypoint-matrix/)
- [APIs By Runtime](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/apis-by-runtime/)
- [Server Quickstart](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/server-quickstart/)
- [Public Quickstart](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/public-quickstart/)
- [Full-Stack Quickstart](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/full-stack/)
- [Common Errors](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/common-errors/)
- [Migration Cheat Sheet](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/migration-cheat-sheet/)
- [Answers API](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/answers/)
- [Audio API](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/audio/)
- [Chapters API](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/chapters/)
- [Hadith References API](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/hadith-references/)
- [Juzs API](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/juzs/)
- [Legacy Migration Guide](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/v1-migration-guide/)
- [QuranReflect Posts](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/quranreflect-posts/)
- [Resources API](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/resources/)
- [SDKs](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/)
- [Search API](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/search/)
- [Verses API](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/sdk/javascript/verses/)

## User APIs v1

- [Accept room invite](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/rooms-controller-accept-invite/)

- [Add note](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/add-note/)
- [Add or update preference](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/add-or-update-preference/)

- [Add/update activity day](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/add-update-activity-day/)

- [Create a new comment](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/comments-controller-create/)

- [Delete post](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/posts-controller-delete/)
- [Delete user account permanently](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/users-controller-delete-account/)
- [Edit post](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/posts-controller-edit/)
- [Edit user profile](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/users-controller-edit-profile/)
- [Estimate reading time](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/estimate-reading-time/)
- [Export posts as PDF](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/posts-controller-export-multiple-posts/)

- [Get bookmark collections](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/get-bookmark-collections/)
- [Get bookmarks within a range of Ayahs](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/get-bookmarks-within-a-range-of-ayahs/)
- [Get collection items by id](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/get-collection-items-by-id/)
- [Get current streak days](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/get-current-streak-days/)
- [Get current user posts](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/posts-controller-get-loggedin-user-posts/)
- [Get featured users for follow recommendation](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/users-controller-get-featured-users/)
- [Get joined or managed rooms](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/rooms-controller-get-rooms/)
- [Get logged-in user rooms](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/users-controller-rooms/)
- [Get note by ID](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/get-note-by-id/)
- [Get notes by attached entity](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/get-notes-by-attached-entity/)
- [Get notes by verse](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/get-notes-by-verse/)
- [Get notes by verse range](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/get-notes-by-verse-range/)
- [Get notes count within verse range](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/get-notes-count-within-verse-range/)
- [Get post by ID](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/posts-controller-find-one/)
- [Get post comments](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/posts-controller-get-comments/)
- [Get post liked state](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/posts-controller-get-liked-state/)
- [Get posts by verse](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/posts-controller-get-my-posts-by-verse/)
- [Get posts count within range](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/posts-controller-get-my-posts-count-within-range/)
- [Get posts feed](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/posts-controller-feed/)
- [Get related posts](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/posts-controller-get-related-posts/)
- [Get replies to a comment](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/comments-controller-get/)
- [Get room members](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/rooms-controller-get-room-members/)
- [Get room posts](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/rooms-controller-get-room-posts/)
- [Get room profile by ID](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/rooms-controller-get-room-profile-by-id/)
- [Get room profile by URL or subdomain](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/rooms-controller-get-room-profile/)

- [Get today's goal plan](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/get-todays-goal-plan/)
- [Get user bookmarks](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/get-user-bookmarks/)
- [Get user followers](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/users-controller-get-user-followers/)

- [Get user reading sessions](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/get-user-reading-sessions/)
- [Get users followed by user](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/users-controller-get-user-following/)
- [Invite user to room](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/rooms-controller-invite-user-to-room/)

- [Leave a group](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/rooms-controller-leave-group/)

- [Toggle post like](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/posts-controller-toggle-like/)

- [Track post view](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/posts-controller-view-tracking/)

- [Update a page](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/user_related_apis_versioned/1.0.0/rooms-controller-update-page/)

## OAuth2 APIs v1

- [Introspect OAuth2 Access and Refresh Tokens](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/oauth2_apis_versioned/1.0.0/introspect-o-auth-2-token/)

- [OAuth2 APIs](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/oauth2_apis_versioned/1.0.0/oauth-2-apis/)
- [OpenID Connect Logout](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/oauth2_apis_versioned/1.0.0/revoke-oidc-session/)
- [OpenID Connect Userinfo](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/oauth2_apis_versioned/1.0.0/get-oidc-user-info/)
- [The OAuth 2.0 Token Endpoint](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/oauth2_apis_versioned/1.0.0/oauth-2-token-exchange/)

- [Android](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/oidc/mobile-apps/android/)

- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/faq/)
- [Full Copies and Recovery](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/content-sync/full-copies-and-recovery/)
- [Getting Started with Content Sync](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/content-sync/getting-started/)
- [Getting Started with Data Sync](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/sync/getting-started/)
- [Handling Sync Conflicts](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/sync/handling-conflicts/)
- [Integrating Quran Font Rendering](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/fonts/font-rendering/)
- [iOS](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/oidc/mobile-apps/iOS/)
- [Mobile Apps](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/oidc/mobile-apps/)
- [OAuth2 Client Setup](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/oidc/client-setup/)
- [OAuth2 Web Integration Example](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/oidc/example-integration/)
- [Offline Content Cache Patterns](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/content-sync/offline-cache-patterns/)
- [Offline-First Architecture Patterns](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/sync/offline-first-patterns/)
- [OpenID Connect](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/oidc/openid-connect/)
- [Page Layout API Guide](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/fonts/page-layout/)
- [React Native](https://api-docs.quran.foundation/docs/tutorials/oidc/mobile-apps/react-native/)
